key_notes: Top choice; widely available in Romania; ferments to dryness at 10°C; excellent for fresh aromatic whites
Specifically recommended for Muscat, Riesling, Gewurztraminer; low VA production; premium aromatic expression
High glycerol and polysaccharides for body; citrus and floral notes; good secondary choice
Positioned specifically for terpenic white wines
Good for aromatic whites; lower risk of SO2 production
